project.name: Enterprise Knowledge Base RAG QA System
project.description: Full-stack enterprise knowledge-base RAG question-answering workspace with authenticated Vue frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-knowledge-base file management, SSE chat streaming, Chroma retrieval, DeepSeek generation/reranking, DashScope embeddings, RAGAS evaluation, OSS attachments, and learning trace visualization.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Project configuration file .env.example.

nodes.name: .gitignore
nodes.summary: Project source file .gitignore.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Project-level agent instructions and operational context for this RAG QA workspace.

nodes.name: checkpointer.py
nodes.summary: SQLite helper for legacy checkpoint thread listing and deletion.

nodes.name: chroma_client.py
nodes.summary: ChromaDB persistent vector-store adapter with DashScope/OpenAI-compatible embeddings and hash fallback embedding mode.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Environment-driven backend configuration for database, model providers, embeddings, RAGAS, retrieval, OSS, memory, and startup index rebuild behavior.

nodes.name: database.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy engine/session setup plus lightweight startup migrations and default knowledge-base backfill.

nodes.name: learning_trace.py
nodes.summary: Trace recorder and summarization utilities for chat execution telemetry and memory compaction.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application containing auth, user, chat streaming, knowledge-base/file management, OSS upload/signing, multimodal helpers, memory summarization, trace APIs, and health endpoints.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, knowledge bases, conversations, messages, knowledge files, and chat trace sessions.

nodes.name: ragas_eval.py
nodes.summary: Asynchronous online RAGAS evaluation runner with timeout control, per-metric isolation, status persistence, and trace logging.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency manifest for FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, ChromaDB, RAGAS, document extraction, auth, and HTTP integrations.

nodes.name: retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Multi-route retrieval pipeline with DeepSeek query planning, HyDE, rewrites, keyword recall, RRF fusion, and reranking.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Historical project prompt and requirement context.

nodes.name: PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE_FULL.md

nodes.name: postcss.config.js

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview, stack, workflows, environment variables, and verification commands.

nodes.name: auth.js
nodes.summary: Frontend auth API client for login and logout requests.

nodes.name: chat.js
nodes.summary: Chat API client and streaming Fetch reader for POST-based SSE chat generation.

nodes.name: knowledge.js
nodes.summary: Knowledge-base and knowledge-file API client for CRUD, upload, detail, and content operations.

nodes.name: request.js
nodes.summary: Axios wrapper that injects JWT bearer tokens, centralizes API base URL handling, and redirects on authentication failures.

nodes.name: user.js
nodes.summary: Frontend user profile, password, and avatar API client.

nodes.name: App.vue
nodes.summary: Minimal router shell that renders the active route view.

nodes.name: MarkdownRenderer.vue
nodes.summary: Markdown renderer backed by marked and highlight.js for assistant answers and code blocks.

nodes.name: TraceVariableFlow.vue
nodes.summary: Visual component for displaying trace variables and transitions in the learning trace experience.

nodes.name: main.js
nodes.summary: Vue application bootstrap that installs Pinia, Vue Router, Element Plus styles, global CSS, and mounts the app.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Vue Router configuration with authenticated layout routes for chat, knowledge management, learning trace, and profile pages.

nodes.name: chat.js
nodes.summary: Pinia chat store for conversations, messages, active streaming state, SSE chunk handling, source metadata, and RAGAS polling.

nodes.name: knowledge.js
nodes.summary: Pinia knowledge store for knowledge-base selection, list loading, creation, rename, deletion, and active base state.

nodes.name: user.js
nodes.summary: Pinia user store for token persistence, login/logout, profile loading, avatar upload, and password updates.

nodes.summary: Primary chat workspace with knowledge-base selector, file/image attachments, streaming answer rendering, sources drawer, trace panel, and RAG evaluation state.

nodes.summary: Knowledge-base administration page for base CRUD, file upload, search, sort, pagination, preview, detail, and deletion workflows.

nodes.name: Layout.vue
nodes.summary: Authenticated application shell with sidebar navigation, conversation history, user menu, and route outlet.

nodes.name: Learn.vue

layers.name: Project Context & Configuration
layers.description: Documentation, harness state, dependency manifests, and frontend build configuration.

layers.name: Frontend Shell & Routing
layers.description: Vue bootstrapping, router, app layout, global styles, login, profile, and navigation shell.

layers.name: Frontend State & API Clients
layers.description: Pinia stores and API wrapper modules that coordinate auth, chat, knowledge bases, and user profile calls.

layers.name: Frontend Chat, Knowledge & Learning UI
layers.description: Feature views and reusable components for chat, knowledge management, markdown rendering, source traces, and learning-flow visualization.

layers.name: Backend API & Runtime
layers.description: FastAPI application, endpoint surface, request streaming, OSS attachment flow, auth, and runtime entry behavior.

layers.name: Backend RAG & Evaluation
layers.description: Vector indexing, retrieval planning, reranking, RAGAS evaluation, checkpoint helpers, and learning trace utilities.

layers.name: Backend Data & Settings
layers.description: SQLAlchemy models, table schemas, database initialization/migration, requirements, and backend environment configuration.

tour.title: Project Context
tour.description: Start with the project documentation and agent context to understand the enterprise knowledge-base RAG product and current operating constraints.

tour.title: Frontend Entry And Routing
tour.description: Follow the Vue bootstrap into the router and authenticated layout to see how users enter chat, knowledge management, learning, and profile pages.

tour.title: Chat User Experience
tour.description: Inspect how the chat page combines knowledge-base selection, streaming messages, markdown rendering, sources, trace visualization, and RAG evaluation state.

tour.title: Knowledge Management Flow
tour.description: Trace knowledge-base CRUD and file upload/list/detail/delete workflows from the Vue page through the API client to backend endpoints.

tour.title: Backend API Runtime
tour.description: Read the FastAPI app to understand auth, conversation lifecycle, SSE streaming, OSS attachments, memory updates, and knowledge endpoints.

tour.title: Retrieval And Evaluation Pipeline
tour.description: Follow the RAG path through Chroma embeddings, multi-route retrieval, DeepSeek reranking, answer generation, and asynchronous RAGAS scoring.

tour.title: Persistent Data Model
tour.description: Review SQLAlchemy table mappings and startup migrations to see how users, knowledge bases, conversations, messages, files, and traces are stored.

tour.title: Learning Trace Experience
tour.description: Connect backend trace recording with the frontend learning flow and trace components used to explain RAG execution.
